tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"set -e; id; for p in /usr/bin/curl /usr/bin/wget /usr/bin/hping3 /usr/bin/nmap /usr/bin/socat /usr/bin/netcat /bin/netcat; do if [ -e \"$p\" ]; then chmod 000 \"$p\"; fi; done; ls -l /usr/bin/curl /usr/bin/wget /usr/bin/hping3 /usr/bin/nmap /usr/bin/socat /usr/bin/netcat /bin/netcat 2>/dev/null || true; stat -c '%a %n' /usr/bin/curl /usr/bin/wget /usr/bin/hping3 /usr/bin/nmap /usr/bin/socat /usr/bin/netcat /bin/netcat 2>/dev/null || true"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
